Examples.Title: Decode input ids
Examples.Code:
### Decode input ids
# @name decode
POST {{host}}/decode
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "ids": [
    0
  ],
  "skip_special_tokens": "true"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Decoded ids
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Batch is empty
# Content-Type: application/json
# 413
# Description: Batch size error
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Tokenization error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get Embeddings. Returns a 424 status code if the model is not an embedding model.
Examples.Code:
### Get Embeddings. Returns a 424 status code if the model is not an embedding model.
# @name embed
POST {{host}}/embed
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "dimensions": "null",
  "inputs": "string",
  "normalize": "true",
  "prompt_name": "null",
  "truncate": "false",
  "truncation_direction": "right"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Embeddings
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Batch is empty
# Content-Type: application/json
# 413
# Description: Batch size error
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Tokenization error
# Content-Type: application/json
# 424
# Description: Embedding Error
# Content-Type: application/json
# 429
# Description: Model is overloaded
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Health check method
Examples.Code:
using var client = new HuggingFaceEmbeddingClient(apiKey);
await client.HealthAsync();
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using HuggingFace;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: OpenAI compatible route. Returns a 424 status code if the model is not an embedding model.
Examples.Code:
### OpenAI compatible route. Returns a 424 status code if the model is not an embedding model.
# @name openai_embed
POST {{host}}/v1/embeddings
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "dimensions": "null",
  "encoding_format": "float",
  "input": "string",
  "model": "null",
  "user": "null"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Embeddings
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Batch is empty
# Content-Type: application/json
# 413
# Description: Batch size error
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Tokenization error
# Content-Type: application/json
# 424
# Description: Embedding Error
# Content-Type: application/json
# 429
# Description: Model is overloaded
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get Predictions. Returns a 424 status code if the model is not a Sequence Classification model
Examples.Code:
### Get Predictions. Returns a 424 status code if the model is not a Sequence Classification model
# @name predict
POST {{host}}/predict
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "inputs": "What is Deep Learning?",
  "raw_scores": "false",
  "truncate": "false",
  "truncation_direction": "right"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Predictions
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Batch is empty
# Content-Type: application/json
# 413
# Description: Batch size error
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Tokenization error
# Content-Type: application/json
# 424
# Description: Prediction Error
# Content-Type: application/json
# 429
# Description: Model is overloaded
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get Ranks. Returns a 424 status code if the model is not a Sequence Classification model with
Examples.Code:
### Get Ranks. Returns a 424 status code if the model is not a Sequence Classification model with
# @name rerank
POST {{host}}/rerank
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "query": "What is Deep Learning?",
  "raw_scores": "false",
  "return_text": "false",
  "texts": [
    "Deep Learning is ..."
  ],
  "truncate": "false",
  "truncation_direction": "right"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Ranks
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Batch is empty
# Content-Type: application/json
# 413
# Description: Batch size error
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Tokenization error
# Content-Type: application/json
# 424
# Description: Rerank Error
# Content-Type: application/json
# 429
# Description: Model is overloaded
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get Sentence Similarity. Returns a 424 status code if the model is not an embedding model.
Examples.Code:
### Get Sentence Similarity. Returns a 424 status code if the model is not an embedding model.
# @name similarity
POST {{host}}/similarity
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "inputs": {
    "sentences": [
      "What is Machine Learning?"
    ],
    "source_sentence": "What is Deep Learning?"
  },
  "parameters": "null"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Sentence Similarity
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Batch is empty
# Content-Type: application/json
# 413
# Description: Batch size error
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Tokenization error
# Content-Type: application/json
# 424
# Description: Embedding Error
# Content-Type: application/json
# 429
# Description: Model is overloaded
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Tokenize inputs
Examples.Code:
### Tokenize inputs
# @name tokenize
POST {{host}}/tokenize
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "add_special_tokens": "true",
  "inputs": "string",
  "prompt_name": "null"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Tokenized ids
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Batch is empty
# Content-Type: application/json
# 413
# Description: Batch size error
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Tokenization error
# Content-Type: application/json
